lines.english: Was Mrs. Rumbold a good companion at dinner?
lines.chinese: 伦布尔德夫人是个好的晚餐伴侣吗？
lines.raw: Was Mrs. Rumbold a good companion at dinner? | 伦布尔德夫人是个好的晚餐伴侣吗？

lines.english: Last week at a dinner party,
lines.raw: Last week at a dinner party, | 上周在一个晚宴上，

lines.english: the hostess asked me to sit next to Mrs. Rumbold.
lines.chinese: 女主人请我坐在伦布尔德夫人旁边。
lines.raw: the hostess asked me to sit next to Mrs. Rumbold. | 女主人请我坐在伦布尔德夫人旁边。

lines.chinese: 伦布尔德夫人是个身材魁梧、
lines.raw: Mrs. Rumbold was a large, | 伦布尔德夫人是个身材魁梧、

lines.english: unsmiling lady in a tight black dress.
lines.chinese: 不苟言笑的女士，穿着一件紧身黑连衣裙。
lines.raw: unsmiling lady in a tight black dress. | 不苟言笑的女士，穿着一件紧身黑连衣裙。

lines.english: She did not even look up when I took my seat beside her.
lines.chinese: 我在她身边坐下时，她甚至没有抬头看我。
lines.raw: She did not even look up when I took my seat beside her. | 我在她身边坐下时，她甚至没有抬头看我。

lines.english: Her eyes were fixed on her plate and in a short time,
lines.chinese: 她的眼睛盯着自己的盘子，不一会儿，
lines.raw: Her eyes were fixed on her plate and in a short time, | 她的眼睛盯着自己的盘子，不一会儿，
she was busy eating. | 她就开始大吃起来。
I tried to make conversation. | 我试图和她攀谈。

lines.english: 'A new play is coming to "The Globe" soon,'
lines.chinese: “一部新戏很快就要在‘环球剧场’上演了，”
lines.raw: 'A new play is coming to "The Globe" soon,' | “一部新戏很快就要在‘环球剧场’上演了，”

lines.english: I said. 'Will you be seeing it?'
lines.raw: I said. 'Will you be seeing it?' | 我说，“您会去看吗？”

lines.english: 'Will you be spending your holidays abroad this year?' I asked.
lines.chinese: “今年您会到国外度假吗？”我问。
lines.raw: 'Will you be spending your holidays abroad this year?' I asked. | “今年您会到国外度假吗？”我问。

lines.english: 'Will you be staying in England?' I asked.
lines.raw: 'Will you be staying in England?' I asked. | “您会留在英格兰吗？”我问。

lines.english: In despair, I asked her whether she was enjoying her dinner.
lines.chinese: 绝望中，我问她是否喜欢她的晚餐。
lines.raw: In despair, I asked her whether she was enjoying her dinner. | 绝望中，我问她是否喜欢她的晚餐。
'Young man,' she answered, | “年轻人，”她回答说，

lines.english: 'if you ate more and talked less, we would both enjoy our dinner!'
lines.chinese: “如果你多吃点，少说点，我们俩都会享受晚餐的！”
lines.raw: 'if you ate more and talked less, we would both enjoy our dinner!' | “如果你多吃点，少说点，我们俩都会享受晚餐的！”
